seoTitle: Toorongo vs Torquay — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Toorongo and Torquay. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Toorongo and Torquay.
heading: Toorongo vs Torquay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Toorongo, Victoria and Torquay, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Toorongo has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Torquay (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Toorongo or Torquay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Toorongo has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Torquay scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Toorongo scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. Torquay scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Toorongo or Torquay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Toorongo has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
